feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Consignment Scheduling Agreements with Self Billing for Automotive?
entry.content:
We are implementing S/4HANA Private Cloud and have a major Automotive Supplier Tier 1 that we need to support Consignment Scheduling Agreements with Self-Billing.  Customer locations in Germany, Hungary, and USA.  Assumption is Self-Billing with Automatic Posting (SBWAP).

It is regular consignment, no third party warehouse external agent.

We receive EDI EDIFACT message types DELFOR, INVRPT, INVOIC (SBI).

Is there a process document more detailed than 4LZ and 4H2 that combines the processes? Configuration guide?  I assume it is Scheduling Agreement (SA) type LK with delivery to do consignment fill up.  Then an ED sales order with reference to the SA for consignment Issue.

Can we trigger the ED Sales order from the INVRPT message or does it have to be manually created?  Thanks for any help.

entry.title: As a SAP MM Functional user, how can I learn the AI part of SAP. What should I learn?
entry.content: I am a SAP MM Functional Consultant. To keep up with the changing dynamics, I want to learn AI with SAP. Any experienced consultant, please provide me a clear roadmap of what to learn and what all resources available both free and paid that I can deep dive into to get a good grasp on AI in SAP. Please assist me.

entry.title: Hi Guru's Help me on periodic billing plan Item net value 5000, can we split 48 months in Sales cont
entry.content:
In Sales contract: Periodic billing plan

For example item net value - 5000 ÷48 months= 104.16

5000÷24 months= 208.3

5000÷36 months= 138.8

Business wants  to show item net value and billing plan must be same.

Can we split into 2years (24 months), 3years (36 months), 4years ( 48 months)

If yes, pl. help me with configuration settings.

entry.title: country of origin
entry.content: In Delivery Item data Foreign trade/customer- where Ctry of origin field is coming from?

entry.title: Foreign Trade Automatic without delivery
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to automatically fill in the Foreign Trade Origin/Destination for an order without delivery? It works with delivery, but in scenarios billed directly after the order, the field is empty.

Thanks

entry.title: Create downpayment related to a service ordre
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Can you please tell me if it is possible to create a downpayment related to a Service Order ?

Thank you four your answer

Regards,

Maxime

entry.title: Ignore offer and thake order number from iDoc
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a valid, open offer for a customer.

The customer sends us an order via ORDERS-Idoc, carrying an order-number, which shall be transferred to the sales order.

The standard beahviour is as follows: SAP ERP checks whether there is an existing quotation and references it. The customer order number (VBKD-BSTKD) is taken from the quotation.

I´ve tried to solve it via E1EP02 and different QUALF as well as with the E1EDK02 and different QUALF. It works fine as soon the quotation is either not valid or the offered quantity is fullfilled.

At what point would you prevent the system from taking the order number from the quotation and using the order number from the iDoc instead?

Thank you and best regards.

entry.title: To create home address on customer contact person.
entry.content:
How to create the home address in customer contact person ? Please provide BAPI or steps to insert home address with example if possible. I have tried sequence

ADDR_insert ,

addr_number_get ,

addr_memory_save and commit

finally sd_customer_maintain_all to update KNVK-ADRNP_2 field with the address number newly created. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Any help please
Text determination procedure in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

 I have created a text procedure ZD and assigned it to the customer account group SDM1. I was trying to create a customer from Tcode BP , but nowhere it is asking for the customer account group because of which text types in ZD are not flowing to created BP. Can someone help in where i should actually give the customer account group in BP.?

Also I am confused with the difference between BP groupings in S4HANA and customer accout group in ECC.

Can someone explain how this differs?

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Billing document not shown in BUSVOL report - CC#
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Pleae guide me on the below issue.

Issue : We have Created a Single payee Condition contract with Business volume selection critetia as Customer and Product hirarchy (PH) with Level one.

System was indentified the business voulme with above combination  and shown the billing document in BUSVOL report .

In our material master we have complete PH with level 5, due to cleansing activity we replaced the PH in material master which is casuing incorrect values in Delta and Settlemnet , becasue after replacening new PH in Material master our billing documnet was disappread from BUSVOL report , but still exist in Customer Invoices - Business Volume Determination (WCB_VBRK_VBRP_BV)

Q: Please guide me is there any way that we can bring back the billing documnets to BUSVOL without change the PH back to original one . Becase, so far we are using the incorrect PH that is why replaced with correct one .

CC

Material master 

We have replaced the level 5 PH and Level 1 which is 05 is same before and after replace new PH ,but the billing document was removed from Busvol report .

Pleae guide me to fix the issue and guide me how system get the trnsaction data from Billing and table WCB_VBRK_VBRP_BV values to BUSVOL report.

Thanks,

Venkatesh Rampe

entry.title: We have a problem with some delivery plans because the cumulative total is not equal to 0.
entry.content:
We have a problem with some delivery plans because the cumulative total is not equal to 0.
Within the same delivery plan with the same material and the same customer, when a new EDI message is added, the system treats one delivery plan item differently than another. In one item, it sets the counter to 0 when the EDI is added, and in other items, it resets to 0.

We don't understand the criteria and need to be clear about it.

entry.title: Create a single credit note to a dummy customer based on different customers sales and per SKU
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to ask, is it possible and how to do in SAP the following scenario:

- create one credit note with a manually entered price to a dummy client (e.g. a national agency)

- there are no sales to this dummy client

- the credit note servers the purpose of a discount provided to this client, a rebate agreement is not used

- the amount of the credit note is different every time

- the credit note should be based on the past quarter sales to different customers and based on a single SKU (which is sold to different customers)

- the manually entered amount is distributed over the sales to these customers per SKU proportionally by the sales amount achieved by each customer 

- at the end, when running a sales report - it should show the sales per customer and per SKU after the discount to match FI side

- the G/L used should be for revenue with a discount, so this credit note reduces the sales revenue at the end

- the aim is to go through SD with a sales document type, as from FI side there is no report which shows sales after discount per SKU, unless there is a solution how to do that only from FI side

Is there any way to do that, or through S/4HANA analytics or another...

Thank you!

entry.title: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on invoices of multiple customers
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to do some custom development in the condition contract management process (or is there another option), so that a sales rebate agreement for a single customer is used to issue a credit note/memo based on invoices of other multiple customers, considering that there are no sales to this customer for which the agreement is created, but a credit note has to be issued to this customer based on the other customer's invoices. There is a connection between this customer and the other customers, outside SAP, which require this.

Thank you!

entry.title: LV61A081 LV61A082 - pricing date vs billing date
entry.content:
Dear Collegue 

We have had a argentine customer claim for a customer invoice because it has wrong calculation of J1X1 Perception and J1A1 Perception. 
We have checked the cause: the requirements 81 and 82 where not fullfilled because the customer master tax grouping records ( table knat) was checked against the pricing date ( komk-prsdt) instead of the billing date ( komk-fkdat) 

In fact , we have found note 1747589 - 1256361 that applies a correction to formula 333 for using billing date instead of pricing date, but 
we have not found any note to be applied related to requirements 81 and 82 for correcting the way it access to table knat using billing date .
We attached the abap code for routines  81 and 82 were it is used the pricing date ( komk-prsdt) for table knat.  

Aditionally, J1X1 and J1A1 conditions are set as pricing date = billing date  in the sap standard ( T685A-KPRDT = C = billing date ) 

Someone had had the same problem? Did you find a solution with a SAP oss note?
We are willing to avoid to  copy the requeriments 81 and 82 to a custom solution to use billing date instead of pricing date , if there is a note to be applied. 

Also we find that in these routines it is not check standard localization table j_1at001tc where it is defined if the perception is active por the company code. 

It seems argentine localization requirements 81 and 82 are not as far as complete ...

Thanks in advance for your imputs
Viviana 

routine 81 - program LV61A081
* check if date is in the subjected interval and therefore valid
      if knat-sbjdf le komk-prsdt and
         knat-sbjdt ge komk-prsdt.
         lv_subrc = 0.
      endif.

routine 82 - program LV61A082
 check if date is in the subjected interval and therefore valid
    if knat-sbjdf le komk-prsdt and
       knat-sbjdt ge komk-prsdt.
      lv_subrc = 0.

entry.title: INTRASTAT - goods from different country than the vendor how to exclude from report
entry.content: Hi how can we exclude from intrastat report cases in which the vendor lets say from Germany provides  goods lets say from Great Britain so it should not be in Intrastat report (because GB is outside EU) but it is because as per the vendor it is from Germany so we have to manually exclude it. Or other case how can we exclude in third party because lets say we buy goods from a country but physically it never reaches our country because we sell it further to our mother company in a different country but for different reasons we probably have to do GR and GI.

entry.title: Re: PGR not happening while doing the sale return
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am doing MTO Process in ECC System.I have done PGI/Billing, Now i am creating Return w.r.t to the Billing i have created the Return Sales Orders but while doing PGR It is showing me one error, attaching the screenshot as well.

Kindly look upon it and help me in this. I have seen various post posted in community but it not solve by issue

Pardeep

entry.title: Custom Fields on Sales order work item in My Inbox app Workflow
entry.content:
I have a requisition to extend standard My Inbox app sales document approval.

I saw SAP says its needed to implementate /IWWRK/BADI_TGW_CUSTOM_ATTR BAdI in the /IWWRK/ES_TGW_CUSTOM_ATTRIBUTE enhancement spot according to the following link:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/9c21e5524eca4abab9d2532591f0c580.html?locale=en-US&version=2021.000

My question is, doest anyone have an example of implementation for it ? Does it fill all the requirements to do it ? Including the Front End view of the field ? It is not needed to extended a specific DDIC structure for it ?

Thank you!

entry.title: Free item category for BOM
entry.content:
Hi All,

   Had a question for free goods determination for Kit items. I have a scenario where the Kit header item is relevant for pricing whereas its components are not relevant for pricing. Currently it is not possible to assign manual item category (tan) for kit header item since it’s graded out, unlike its components after BOM explosion where we can populate the manual item category in sales order. Is there any possibility that I can make the header item free of charge by populating the item category (tann) manually.

SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: SHD0 Variant Issue: User Assignment Not Working as Expected
entry.content:
I created a variant via SHD0 for VA01 to set the Payment Term field to grey/display mode and assigned it to two users. I also assigned this variant in VOV8. However, it is not working for the specific two users, it applies to all users instead.

Additionally, I tested grey/display mode fields with user assignments for fields not under the order type, such as the Sales Organization field on the initial screen of VA01 and it worked for specific users. It seems that when fields are under the order type, the variant must be assigned to VOV8 for it to work. However, after assigning the variant in VOV8, the user assignment does not function as expected.

Is there an option in SHD0 to meet my requirement without using a user exit?

Thank you in advance!

 SD (Sales and Distribution)
